title: Update Archmap provider baseline to v0.1.1
description: Update AOF Archmap external provider references from Archmap v0.1.0 to v0.1.1, preserve the source-of-truth boundary, and verify the change through Archmap impact and release-state audits.
triage_notes: Completed Archmap provider baseline update: docs now reference Archmap v0.1.1 and optional archmap-icons v0.1.2; AOF source-of-truth boundary preserved; Council review CRP-TASK-080-ARCHMAP-V011 and Archmap impact TASK-080 recorded.
